name: Pineapple-Coconut Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, cornmeal, all-purpose flour, and salt.
2. Add the beaten eggs and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Stir until well blended.
3. Pour in the melted butter, flaked coconut, and crushed pineapple. Mix until thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pastry shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until set. Cover with aluminum foil after 40 minutes to prevent over-browning.
6. Allow the pie to cool on a wire rack before serving.
Yield: One 9-inch pie.
